/bin/zsh -lc "docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml exec -T backend python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from app.db import StorySetup, WorkflowStage, WorkflowStageState, get_session_factory
from app.services.sessions import SessionService

session_factory = get_session_factory()
with session_factory() as db_session:
    service = SessionService(db_session)
    snapshot = service.create_session(working_title='Audio Estimate QA')

    for stage in (
        WorkflowStage.GENRE,
        WorkflowStage.TONE,
        WorkflowStage.BRIEF,
        WorkflowStage.PITCHES,
        WorkflowStage.CHARACTERS,
        WorkflowStage.BEATS,
    ):
        service.update_stage_state(
            snapshot.id,
            stage=stage,
            status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
            detail=f'Accepted {stage.value}.',
        )

    story_setup = StorySetup(
        session_id=snapshot.id,
        revision_number=1,
        target_word_count=1800,
        target_runtime_minutes=12,
        chapter_count=3,
        guidance_notes='Three short chapters with calm chapter landings.',
        is_selected=True,
        accepted_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
    )
    db_session.add(story_setup)
    db_session.commit()

    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.STORY_SETUP,
        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
        detail='Accepted story setup preferences.',
    )
    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.COMPOSITION,
        status=WorkflowStageState.COMPLETED,
        detail='Draft story completed.',
    )
    service.update_stage_state(
        snapshot.id,
        stage=WorkflowStage.AUDIO,
        status=WorkflowStageState.IN_PROGRESS,
        detail='Tune narration settings.',
    )

    print(snapshot.id)
PY"
